---
name: CAD Modelling Task
about: Propose or assign a CAD modelling or reverse-engineering task
title: "[CAD] "
labels: cad
assignees: ''

---

**Objective**
A clear and concise description of what needs to be modelled.

**Dependencies**
- Pre-requisite scans: [e.g. `docs/03_scans/SCAN-INVENTORY.md`]
- Input geometry/parameters: [reference the register]

**Acceptance criteria**
- [ ] Adheres to `FUSION_WORKFLOW.md` (top-down assembly, etc.)
- [ ] Parameterized correctly per `PARAMETER-SCHEMA.md`
- [ ] File named per `FILE-NAMING-CONVENTION.md`
- [ ] No conversion failures or broken timeline features

**Assumptions / TBDs**
List any assumptions being made during this task.
